editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 15 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 15 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: World Youth Skills Day — 15 July
articles.summary: World Youth Skills Day (15 July) highlights the importance of equipping young people with skills for employment and entrepreneurship.
articles.summary_hi: विश्व युवा कौशल दिवस (15 जुलाई) रोजगार और उद्यमिता के लिए युवाओं को कौशल देने के महत्व पर प्रकाश डालता है।
articles.content:
World Youth Skills Day is observed every year on 15 July, designated by the United Nations in 2014.

The day promotes Technical and Vocational Education and Training (TVET) to address youth unemployment and skill gaps. India's Skill India Mission aligns with this global goal.

Key Indian initiatives include Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY), National Skill Development Mission, and Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs). Over 1.4 crore youth have been trained under PMKVY.

For IB ACIO: date (15 July), UN designation (2014), and PMKVY under Skill India are important facts.
articles.content_hi:
विश्व युवा कौशल दिवस हर वर्ष 15 जुलाई को मनाया जाता है, UN ने 2014 में नामित किया।

TVET को बढ़ावा, Skill India Mission। PMKVY, ITIs प्रमुख पहल।

IB ACIO: 15 जुलाई, 2014, PMKVY — याद रखें।
articles.question: World Youth Skills Day is observed on which date?
articles.question_hi: विश्व युवा कौशल दिवस किस तिथि को मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: World Youth Skills Day is observed annually on 15 July since 2014.
articles.explanation_hi: विश्व युवा कौशल दिवस 2014 से हर वर्ष 15 जुलाई को मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Skill India launched 2015. PMKVY provides short-term training and certification. NSDC implements many skill programmes.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Skill India 2015। PMKVY प्रशिक्षण और प्रमाणन। NSDC कार्यान्वयन।

articles.title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
articles.summary: PMKVY is the flagship scheme under Skill India, providing free short-duration skill training and certification to youth.
articles.summary_hi: PMKVY Skill India की प्रमुख योजना, युवाओं को मुफ्त अल्पकालिक कौशल प्रशिक्षण और प्रमाणन।
articles.content:
Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY) was launched in 2015 as part of the Skill India Mission.

It provides free skill training to Indian youth in industry-relevant job roles, with monetary rewards (kaushal deen) upon successful certification. Training is aligned with National Skills Qualification Framework (NSQF).

Implemented by National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) under the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship. PMKVY 4.0 is the latest iteration.

For IB ACIO: launch (2015), implementing agency (NSDC), and link to Skill India are scheme essentials.
articles.content_hi:
PMKVY 2015 में Skill India के तहत शुरू। NSQF के अनुसार मुफ्त प्रशिक्षण, प्रमाणन पर प्रोत्साहन।

NSDC लागू करता है, कौशल विकास मंत्रालय। PMKVY 4.0 नवीनतम।

IB ACIO: 2015, NSDC — याद रखें।
articles.question: PMKVY is implemented by which organisation?
articles.question_hi: PMKVY किस संगठन द्वारा लागू किया जाता है?
articles.explanation: PMKVY is implemented by the National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC).
articles.explanation_hi: PMKVY National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) द्वारा लागू किया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: World Youth Skills Day (today's article). DGT runs ITIs under same ministry.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: आज का युवा कौशल दिवस लेख। DGT ITIs चलाता है।

articles.title: Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) — India’s Membership
articles.title_hi: शanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) — भारत की सदस्यता
articles.summary: India became a full SCO member in 2017. SCO focuses on security, counter-terrorism, and regional cooperation in Eurasia.
articles.summary_hi: India 2017 में SCO का पूर्ण सदस्य बना। SCO EurAsia में सुरक्षा, आतंकवाद-विरोध और क्षेत्रीय सहयोग।
articles.content:
The Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) was founded in 2001 by China, Russia, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, and Uzbekistan.

India and Pakistan became full members in 2017. Iran joined as a full member in 2023. SCO covers 40% of world population and 30% of global GDP.

India has hosted SCO Summit (2023, virtual under India's chairmanship). Key focus areas: counter-terrorism (RATS), economic cooperation, and connectivity.

For IB ACIO: founding (2001), India full member (2017), and Iran (2023) are SCO facts.
articles.content_hi:
SCO 2001 में स्थापित। India और Pakistan 2017 में पूर्ण सदस्य। Iran 2023 में।

India 2023 में SCO अध्यक्षता। RATS आतंकवाद-विरोध।

IB ACIO: 2001, India 2017 — याद रखें।
articles.question: India became a full member of SCO in which year?
articles.question_hi: India SCO का पूर्ण सदस्य किस वर्ष बना?
articles.explanation: India and Pakistan were granted full membership of SCO at the Astana Summit in 2017.
articles.explanation_hi: India और Pakistan को 2017 Astana शिखर में SCO की पूर्ण सदस्यता मिली।
articles.moreInfo: Compare: BRICS (13 July edition), NATO (11 July). SCO HQ: Beijing. RATS = Regional Anti-Terrorist Structure.
articles.moreInfo_hi: तुलना: BRICS, NATO। SCO HQ Beijing। RATS = Regional Anti-Terrorist Structure।

articles.title: NITI Aayog — Think Tank Replacing Planning Commission
articles.title_hi: NITI Aayog — योजना आयोग की जगह थिंक टैंक
articles.summary: NITI Aayog was formed on 1 January 2015, replacing the 65-year-old Planning Commission as India's premier policy think tank.
articles.summary_hi: NITI Aayog 1 जनवरी 2015 को बना, 65 वर्ष पुराने योजना आयोग की जगह भारत का प्रमुख नीति थिंक टैंक।
articles.content:
NITI (National Institution for Transforming India) Aayog was established on 1 January 2015 via executive resolution, replacing the Planning Commission.

Unlike the Planning Commission, NITI Aayog is an advisory body with cooperative federalism — states are equal partners. The PM is Chairperson and CEO leads the organisation.

Key initiatives: Aspirational Districts Programme, SDG India Index, Atal Innovation Mission, and health/education sector reforms.

For IB ACIO: formation (1 Jan 2015), replaced Planning Commission, PM as Chairperson, and cooperative federalism model.
articles.content_hi:
NITI Aayog 1 जनवरी 2015, योजना आयोग की जगह। सलाहकार निकाय, सहकारी संघवाद।

PM अध्यक्ष, CEO प्रमुख। Aspirational Districts, SDG Index, Atal Innovation Mission।

IB ACIO: 2015, PM Chairperson — याद रखें।
articles.question: NITI Aayog replaced which institution?
articles.question_hi: NITI Aayog ने किस संस्था की जगह ली?
articles.explanation: NITI Aayog replaced the Planning Commission which had existed since 1950.
articles.explanation_hi: NITI Aayog ने 1950 से चले आ रहे योजना आयोग की जगह ली।
articles.moreInfo: Planning Commission used top-down Five Year Plans. NITI Aayog promotes bottom-up, state-driven planning.
articles.moreInfo_hi: योजना आयोग: Five Year Plans। NITI Aayog: राज्य-चालित योजना।

articles.title: BrahMos — India-Russia Supersonic Cruise Missile
articles.summary: BrahMos is the world's fastest supersonic cruise missile, jointly developed by India (DRDO) and Russia (NPOM).
articles.summary_hi: BrahMos दुनिया की सबसे तेज सुपरसोनिक क्रूज मिसाइल, India (DRDO) और Russia (NPOM) द्वारा संयुक्त विकास।
articles.content:
BrahMos is a medium-range ramjet supersonic cruise missile named after Brahmaputra and Moskva rivers.

Developed jointly by DRDO of India and NPOM of Russia. Speed: Mach 2.8 to 3 (nearly 3 times speed of sound). Range extended to 450+ km after India joined MTCR in 2016.

Variants include ship-launched, submarine-launched, air-launched (Su-30MKI), and land-based. BrahMos Aerospace is the joint venture company headquartered in New Delhi.

For IB ACIO: developers (DRDO+Russia), speed (Mach 2.8+), and MTCR link for extended range.
articles.content_hi:
BrahMos DRDO (India) + NPOM (Russia) द्वारा। Mach 2.8-3 गति। MTCR 2016 के बाद रेंज 450+ km।

जहाज, पनडुब्बी, Su-30MKI, जमीन से लॉन्च। HQ New Delhi।

IB ACIO: DRDO+Russia, Mach 2.8 — याद रखें।
articles.question: BrahMos missile was jointly developed by India and which country?
articles.question_hi: BrahMos मिसाइल India और किस देश द्वारा संयुक्त विकसित?
articles.explanation: BrahMos was jointly developed by DRDO (India) and NPOM (Russia).
articles.explanation_hi: BrahMos DRDO (India) और NPOM (Russia) द्वारा संयुक्त विकसित।
articles.moreInfo: Related: S-400 (14 July), Tejas (13 July). BrahMos-II hypersonic variant under development.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: S-400, Tejas। BrahMos-II hypersonic विकास में।

articles.title: Aadhaar — World’s Largest Biometric ID System
articles.title_hi: आधार — दुनिया की सबसे बड़ी बायोमेट्रिक ID प्रणाली
articles.summary: Aadhaar is a 12-digit unique identity number issued by UIDAI, covering over 138 crore residents of India.
articles.summary_hi: आधार UIDAI द्वारा जारी 12 अंकों की विशिष्ट पहचान, 138 करोड़+ निवासियों को कवर।
articles.content:
Aadhaar was launched in 2009 and is issued by the Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI) under the Aadhaar Act, 2016.

It uses biometric (fingerprint, iris) and demographic data. Aadhaar enables Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT), JAM trinity, and digital authentication.

Supreme Court upheld Aadhaar constitutionality in 2018 (with conditions). Aadhaar is not proof of citizenship but proof of identity/residence.

For IB ACIO: UIDAI, 12-digit number, Aadhaar Act 2016, and JAM trinity link are digital India essentials.
articles.content_hi:
आधार 2009 में शुरू, UIDAI द्वारा, Aadhaar अधिनियम 2016।

बायोमेट्रिक + जनसांख्यिकी। DBT, JAM trinity। SC 2018 में संवैधानिकता बरकरार।

IB ACIO: UIDAI, 12 अंक, 2016 — याद रखें।
articles.question: Aadhaar is issued by which authority?
articles.question_hi: आधार किस प्राधिकरण द्वारा जारी किया जाता है?
articles.explanation: Aadhaar is issued by the Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI).
articles.explanation_hi: आधार Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI) द्वारा जारी होता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: UPI (11 July), Digital India (13 July). JAM = Jan Dhan + Aadhaar + Mobile.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: UPI, Digital India। JAM = Jan Dhan + Aadhaar + Mobile।

articles.title: Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) — Constitutional Watchdog
articles.title_hi: नियंत्रक एवं महालेखा परीक्षक (CAG) — संवैधानिक प्रहरी
articles.summary: CAG audits all government expenditure under Article 148 — guardian of public purse, appointed by the President.
articles.summary_hi: CAG धारा 148 के तहत सरकारी व्यय का ऑडिट — सार्वजनिक कोष का रक्षक, राष्ट्रपति द्वारा नियुक्त।
articles.content:
The Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India is an independent constitutional authority under Article 148.

Appointed by the President for a 6-year term or till age 65. CAG audits accounts of Union and State governments, PSUs, and bodies funded by government.

Reports are submitted to the President/Governor and placed before Parliament/Legislature. Public Accounts Committee (PAC) examines CAG reports.

For IB ACIO: Article 148, 6-year term, and PAC connection are audit/accountability essentials.
articles.content_hi:
CAG धारा 148 के तहत स्वतंत्र संवैधानिक प्राधिकरण। राष्ट्रपति नियुक्त, 6 वर्ष या 65 वर्ष।

Union/State, PSU ऑडिट। PAC रिपोर्ट जांच।

IB ACIO: धारा 148, 6 वर्ष — याद रखें।
articles.question: CAG of India is appointed under which Article of the Constitution?
articles.question_hi: India का CAG संविधान की किस धारा के तहत नियुक्त होता है?
articles.explanation: Article 148 provides for the appointment of the Comptroller and Auditor General of India.
articles.explanation_hi: धारा 148 India के CAG की नियुक्ति का प्रावधान करती है।
articles.moreInfo: Article 280: Finance Commission. Article 124: SC. First CAG: V. Narahari Rao (1948).

articles.title: International Tiger Day — 29 July (Preview for Exam)
articles.title_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय बाघ दिवस — 29 जुलाई (परीक्षा के लिए)
articles.summary: International Tiger Day (29 July) raises awareness for tiger conservation — India leads with Project Tiger since 1973.
articles.summary_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय बाघ दिवस (29 जुलाई) बाघ संरक्षण जागरूकता — India 1973 से Project Tiger में अग्रणी।
articles.content:
International Tiger Day is celebrated on 29 July every year at the St Petersburg Tiger Summit (2010) initiative.

India hosts about 75% of the world's wild tigers (3,167 as per 2022 census). Project Tiger (1973) and NTCA oversee conservation.

Key tiger reserves: Corbett (oldest), Bandipur, Kanha, Sundarbans, Kaziranga (also has tigers). TX2 goal aimed to double wild tiger population globally.

For IB ACIO: date (29 July), India 75% tigers, Project Tiger 1973, and 2022 count 3,167.
articles.content_hi:
अंतर्राष्ट्रीय बाघ दिवस 29 जुलाई, 2010 St Petersburg Summit से।

India ~75% wild tigers, 2022: 3,167। Project Tiger 1973, NTCA।

Corbett सबसे पुराना reserve। IB ACIO: 29 July, 3167 — याद रखें।
articles.question: International Tiger Day is observed on:
articles.question_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय बाघ दिवस कब मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: International Tiger Day is observed on 29 July each year for tiger conservation awareness.
articles.explanation_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय बाघ दिवस हर वर्ष 29 जुलाई को बाघ संरक्षण जागरूकता के लिए।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Project Tiger article (14 July). 5 June = World Environment Day.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: 14 जुलाई Project Tiger। 5 June = World Environment Day।

articles.title: Finance Commission — Constitutional Body Under Article 280
articles.title_hi: वित्त आयोग — धारा 280 के तहत संवैधानिक निकाय
articles.summary: Finance Commission recommends distribution of tax revenues between Centre and States every five years.
articles.summary_hi: वित्त आयोग हर पांच वर्ष केंद्र और राज्यों के बीच कर राजस्व वितरण की सिफारिश करता है।
articles.content:
The Finance Commission is a constitutional body under Article 280, appointed by the President every five years (or earlier).

It recommends: distribution of net proceeds of taxes between Centre and States, principles governing grants-in-aid, and measures to augment State Consolidated Funds.

15th Finance Commission (2017-2026) was chaired by N.K. Singh. 16th FC (2026-2031) has been constituted.

For IB ACIO: Article 280, 5-year cycle, and 15th/16th FC are fiscal federalism facts.
articles.content_hi:
वित्त आयोग धारा 280, राष्ट्रपति द्वारा हर 5 वर्ष नियुक्त।

कर राजस्व वितरण, grants-in-aid सिफारिश। 15वां FC: N.K. Singh (2017-2026)। 16वां FC गठित।

IB ACIO: धारा 280, 5 वर्ष — याद रखें।
articles.question: Under which Article is the Finance Commission constituted?
articles.question_hi: वित्त आयोग किस धारा के तहत गठित होता है?
articles.explanation: Article 280 of the Constitution provides for the constitution of the Finance Commission.
articles.explanation_hi: संविधान की धारा 280 वित्त आयोग के गठन का प्रावधान करती है।
articles.moreInfo: Contrast CAG (148), Election Commission (324), Finance Commission (280). All are constitutional bodies.
articles.moreInfo_hi: CAG (148), Election Commission (324), Finance Commission (280) — तुलना करें।

articles.title: Chess Olympiad — India’s Historic Gold in 2024
articles.title_hi: चेस ओलंपियाड — India का 2024 में ऐतिहासिक स्वर्ण
articles.summary: India won both Open and Women's gold at the 45th Chess Olympiad in Budapest 2024 — a historic double triumph.
articles.summary_hi: India ने Budapest 2024 में 45वें Chess Olympiad में Open और Women दोनों में स्वर्ण जीता — ऐतिहासिक दोहरा triumph।
articles.content:
At the 45th Chess Olympiad held in Budapest, Hungary in 2024, India created history by winning gold in both the Open and Women's sections.

The Open team included Gukesh D, Arjun Erigaisi, R Praggnanandhaa, Vidit Gujrathi, and Harikrishna. The Women's team included Harika, Vaishali, Divya, Vantika, and Tania.

Gukesh Dommaraju later became World Chess Champion in 2024, defeating Ding Liren. India is emerging as a global chess superpower.

For IB ACIO: Budapest 2024, double gold, and Gukesh as World Champion are recent sports CA highlights.
articles.content_hi:
45वां Chess Olympiad Budapest 2024 — India Open + Women दोनों में gold।

Open: Gukesh, Arjun, Praggnanandhaa, Vidit, Harikrishna। Women: Harika, Vaishali आदि।

Gukesh 2024 World Champion। IB ACIO: Budapest, double gold — याद रखें।
articles.question: India won double gold at the Chess Olympiad held in which city in 2024?
articles.question_hi: India ने 2024 Chess Olympiad में किस शहर में दोहरा स्वर्ण जीता?
articles.explanation: India won both Open and Women's gold at the 45th Chess Olympiad in Budapest, Hungary in 2024.
articles.explanation_hi: India ने 2024 में Budapest, Hungary में 45वें Chess Olympiad में Open और Women दोनों gold जीता।
articles.moreInfo: Viswanathan Anand was first Indian Grandmaster (1988). Chennai hosts many chess events.
articles.moreInfo_hi: Viswanathan Anand पहले Indian Grandmaster (1988)। Chennai chess hub।
